summary: Verified all 5 fixes for licensee view issues. Backend: total_trades now correctly counts unique trading days (33 trades for test licensee), total_profit correctly calculated ($438.90). Frontend: Trading signal hidden for licensees on both ProfitTrackerPage and DashboardPage, 3-card layout (Account Value, Deposits, Total Profit) displays correctly without LOT Size card.

test_results.backend_total_trades_fix: VERIFIED - /api/admin/members/{user_id} returns total_trades=33 for test licensee (was 0 before fix)
test_results.frontend_signal_hidden_profit_tracker: VERIFIED - Trading signal banner and Trade Now button hidden for licensee simulation on ProfitTrackerPage
test_results.frontend_signal_hidden_dashboard: VERIFIED - Trading signal card hidden for licensee simulation on DashboardPage
test_results.frontend_card_layout: VERIFIED - Only 3 cards (Account Value, Deposits, Total Profit) displayed for licensees, LOT Size card hidden

context_for_next_testing_agent: All licensee fixes verified working. Backend fix in server.py lines 2563-2591 counts unique dates from master admin's trade_logs instead of querying for non-existent has_traded field. Frontend hides trading signals for licensees using isLicensee check (line 697 in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx). Card layout uses conditional grid classes (line 1689).
